mapper.insert: insert into school_backend_manage.dorm_change_application (student_no, current_dormitory_id, target_dormitory_id, reason, application_time) VALUES (#{studentNo}, #{currentDormitoryId}, #{targetDormitoryId}, #{reason}, #{applicationTime})
mapper.select: SELECT sdi.building_id AS buildingId, sdi.dormitory_number AS dormitoryNumber, b.building_number AS buildingNumber, b.assigned_gender AS assignedGender, d.capacity, d.available_beds AS availableBeds, d.status FROM student_dormitory_info sdi LEFT JOIN build b ON sdi.building_id = b.id LEFT JOIN dormitory d ON sdi.building_id = d.building_id AND sdi.dormitory_number = d.dormitory_no WHERE sdi.user_no = #{userNo} AND sdi.is_info_completed = 1
SELECT * FROM school_backend_manage.repair_application WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE school_backend_manage.repair_application SET is_deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT application_id, student_no, current_dormitory_id, target_dormitory_id, reason, application_time, status, approval_time, approver_no, comment FROM school_backend_manage.dorm_change_application WHERE application_id = #{applicationId} AND is_deleted = 0

SELECT d.dormitory_id FROM student_dormitory_info sdi INNER JOIN dormitory d ON sdi.building_id = d.building_id AND sdi.dormitory_number = d.dormitory_no WHERE sdi.user_no = #{userNo} AND sdi.is_info_completed = 1
SELECT CONCAT(b.building_number, '号楼-', sdi.dormitory_number) AS dormInfo FROM student_dormitory_info sdi LEFT JOIN build b ON sdi.building_id = b.id WHERE sdi.user_no = #{studentNo}
SELECT CONCAT(b.building_number, '号楼-', d.dormitory_no) AS dormName FROM dormitory d LEFT JOIN build b ON d.building_id = b.id WHERE d.dormitory_id = #{dormitoryId}
